flags.message: CourtListener MCP returned HTTP 429 (1200/day rate limit already exhausted) on this cell's first and only call, at ~00:05 UTC. The cell degraded gracefully (fresh one-day-old snapshot made the lookup confirmatory only), but other cells in this fan-out may be starved of live retrieval entirely.

The predict prompt directs anchoring on the per-Term 'Segment base rate by salience band' table in the committed statpack, but metrics/statpack.md and statpack.json in this checkout carry no such section. Anchored on the Term 2025 paid fee-class grant rate (~5.4%) plus the relist/CVSG cuts instead.
